subject: Leese Family (from Julian)
body:
Dear Boy,

Please find pictures including civil ceremony in Canada and family
photo in Thailand.   Group photo includes, from left; youngest
daughter Perdy, cousin Cosima, Nicks youngest son JJ, Nicks second
son Hubie, my eldest daughter Mimi, p.a. Nick Beith, my second
daughter Tara, Marina, Nick, Gia, James and myself.
Always thinking of you and the old days and would love to see you.

Lots of love

Julian

ps. Dear Jeffrey,
Julian had dictated a very funny and very nice email for me to
forward to you and have to admit I lost it!  He is in Singapore now
visiting Nick and asked me to send you this with our contact
details; there are so many ways to contact us I felt the list was
ridiculously long so will edit it to:
blackberry: 1-403-605-1974
Barbados: 1-246-422-9535
Canada: 1-403-294-1831

I look forward to meeting you one day and until then - lots of love
from us all!

xoxo gia


-- 
See Exclusive Video: 10th Annual Young Hollywood Awards
http://www.hollywoodlife.net/younghollywoodawards2008/
